text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Hmm, what to do... Might be a little far.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I thought maybe there'd be an ice-skating rink close to school, but I don't see any in the area.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Back at home, I'd go whenever I needed to take
my mind off things... It's soothing in a different
way from running.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no being homesick! Trainer, could you help
me find another way to blow off steam that's
more convenient?
